parsed_output.justification: James is the most suspicious player due to his contradictory role claims and attempts to manipulate the group. He initially claims to be the Seer, then later claims to be the Robber who robbed Paul. Most tellingly, he attempts to frame Tyler as a Werewolf by claiming that seeing a card in the center is only possible for a Werewolf, which is false as the Seer can also look at center cards. This deliberate attempt to mislead the village about the game rules is a strong indicator of Werewolf behavior.

validation.justification: James is the most suspicious player due to his contradictory role claims and attempts to manipulate the group. He initially claims to be the Seer, then later claims to be the Robber who robbed Paul. Most tellingly, he attempts to frame Tyler as a Werewolf by claiming that seeing a card in the center is only possible for a Werewolf, which is false as the Seer can also look at center cards. This deliberate attempt to mislead the village about the game rules is a strong indicator of Werewolf behavior.
